pc_extras_clocks.description: Clocks tied to PC extras, artifact awakening, and persistent consequences created mid-session.

tracking_swiftclaw.name: Tracking Swiftclaw
tracking_swiftclaw.description: Successful leads and ground gained while hunting Swiftclaw
advancement_triggers: Create Advantage: clear tracks, blood trail, witness report (+1)

race_is_on_with_aela.name: Race is on with Aela
race_is_on_with_aela.description: Time pressure: Aela may kill Swiftclaw first if you waste time
race_is_on_with_aela.completion_effect: Quest fails: Aela kills Swiftclaw first; no special reward

honor_proving_contracts_done.name: Honor Proving — Contracts Done
honor_proving_contracts_done.description: Complete Hall contracts to prove reliability before the Harbinger assigns the Wuuthrad fragment mission
honor_proving_contracts_done.completion_effect: Summoned to Kodlak and Skjor; Dustman’s Cairn mission assigned
advancement_triggers: Complete a hard contract (+1, may also add a bonus reward)

shehai_cold_snow_awakening.name: Shehai Awakening — Cold Snow
shehai_cold_snow_awakening.description: Tracks the spiritual deepening of Wayn's Ansei's Shehai of Cold Snow as he grows into true Sagecraft
shehai_cold_snow_awakening.completion_effect: Shehai reaches full awakening (Level 4/4); unlocks all stunt slots
advancement_triggers: Significant Milestone: Finish Companions Storyline Act I (+1)
Major narrative moment of soul-forging or personal breakthrough (+1)
GM award for exceptional roleplay of Ansei discipline (+1)

mythless_bounty_heat.name: Mythless Bounty Heat
mythless_bounty_heat.description: Tracks how much heat Wayn has drawn from witnesses, records, and bold deeds. Fills via Trouble compels. On full clock: spawn the next bounty hunter (by tier), reset to 0, advance tier (capped at max_tier).
mythless_bounty_heat.completion_effect: Spawn next bounty hunter from data/bounty_hunters/mythless_bounty_chain.json (by tier). Reset heat to 0. Advance tier by +1, capped at max_tier (3).
advancement_triggers: Manifest the Shehai in public or do anything unmistakably Ansei (+2)
Give your full name/title to officials, innkeepers, or record-keepers (+1)
Win big, insult big, or fight loud in a witnessed public space (+1)
Traveler from Cyrodiil recognizes you, or 'Mythless' reaches the wrong ear (+2)
Directly cross the Empire in a way that becomes a repeatable story (+1)
setback_triggers: Lay low — travel under a false name, avoid heroics, take quiet work for a scene (-1, min 0)
mythless_bounty_heat.gm_notes: Do NOT respond to this clock by swarming Wayn with hold guards. Use the escalating bounty hunter ladder instead. No global Imperial posters — heat spreads by travelers, ledgers, bribed witnesses, and hunter networks.
